name: Top 10 Stretches Your Body Needs
description: A sequence of 10 essential stretches covering full body mobility, focusing on hips, legs, and core. Hold each stretch 30 seconds or perform 10 reps for dynamic movements.

exercises.notes: Dynamic pumping in low split position
Each side — keep hips square, fold over front leg
Each side — elbows down for deeper stretch
Pulse hips up and down, keep shoulders away from ears
Use wall for support if needed, controlled lean back
Gently press knees down, hinge from hips
Keep back straight, fold from hips
Support lower back with hands, avoid neck strain
Each side — keep heel down on working leg

tips: Hold each stretch for 30 seconds or perform 10 reps for dynamic ones
These 10 stretches cover everything — save this routine
Great for post-workout recovery or standalone mobility session

media.caption: The Top 10 Stretches Your Body Needs
